reasoning_content: We need to determine if 389 is prime. Check divisibility: sqrt(389) ≈ 19.7, so test primes up to 19: 2,3,5,7,11,13,17,19. 389 is odd, not divisible by 2. Sum digits: 3+8+9=20, not divisible by 3. Doesn't end with 0 or 5, so not divisible by 5. For 7: 7*55=385, remainder 4, so not. For 11: alternating sum: 3-8+9=4, not divisible by 11. For 13: 13*29=377, remainder 12; 13*30=390, too big, so no. For 17: 17*22=374, remainder 15; 17*23=391, too big. For 19: 19*20=380, remainder 9; 19*21=399, too big. So no divisors. Thus 389 is prime. Answer yes.
